_readme: Config + allowlists for scripts/check-docs-alignment.mjs (DOC-08). Every allowlist entry carries a reason + owning ledger ID so the discipline stays reviewable. See docs/DOCS_ALIGNMENT.md.

scan.reason: forward declaration; writer lands in Learner Model slice 3

rawRefsAllow.reason: Knowledge Mine word-progress subcollection; no firestore.ts helper by design (FIRESTORE_AUDIT)
Word Wall reads the same Knowledge Mine word-progress subcollection; no helper by design

_resilience_readme: DOC-09 resilience invariants. remoteCallAllow = src/features files whose raw httpsCallable call is deliberately un-guarded (justified exceptions to check 7, SOFT→HARD). imageDownscaleAllow = image file-inputs that legitimately skip in-file downscale — either the downscale lives in an imported handler (pointer in the reason) or the flow genuinely needs the original (sketch/photo). Check 9 (silent-fallback census) has NO allowlist by design — it is report-only and never fails CI.

imageDownscaleAllow.reason: capture routes through useUnifiedCapture.handleUnifiedCapture, which downscales before upload (Today capture pipeline)
upload routes through useFoundationsReview, which downscales before the vision call
chat image upload routes through useShellyChatFlows (compressIfNeeded before uploadBytes)
onAddImage routes through useBook.addImageToPage, which compresses via compressIfNeeded before upload
genuine originals-needed: enhanceSketch reimagines the original scan; downscaling would degrade the source
genuine originals-needed: feature-extraction / photo-transform CF needs the original photo
